news.title_en: AMD Stock Rises on Vote of Confidence From a Big AI Chip Customer
news.title_zh: AMD Stock Rises on Vote of Confidence From a Big AI Chip Customer
news.summary_en: Microsoft plans to use AMD’s Helios AI infrastructure platform and EPYC data-center processors to power more of its Azure cloud-computing services, the two companies said Monday.  AMD stock jumped 5.1% to $521.23 on Monday after the market open, while the  rose 0.7%.  A combination of Microsoft and AMD technology will power new tools for data processing, electronic design automation, and inference, or running AI models.

news.title_en: Biohaven to Present New Clinical Data at ESMO Congress on BHV-1530, a Novel FGFR3-Directed ADC With a Proprietary Topoisomerase I (TopoIx) Payload
news.title_zh: Biohaven to Present New Clinical Data at ESMO Congress on BHV-1530, a Novel FGFR3-Directed ADC With a Proprietary Topoisomerase I (TopoIx) Payload
news.summary_en: Biohaven Ltd. (NYSE: BHVN) ("Biohaven"), a global clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of life-changing therapies to treat a broad range of rare and common diseases, today announced that new data on BHV-1530, its FGFR3-directed antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) using a novel topoisomerase I (TopoIx) payload, will be presented at the European Society for Medical Oncology (ESMO) Congress 2026, to be held October 23-27 in Madrid, Spain.
news.summary_zh: Biohaven Ltd. (NYSE: BHVN) ("Biohaven"), a global clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of life-changing therapies to treat a broad range of rare and common diseases, today announced that new data on BHV-1530, its FGFR3-directed antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) using a novel topoisomerase I (TopoIx) payload, will be presented at the European Society for Medical Oncology (ESMO) Congress 2026, to be held October 23-27 in Madrid, Spain.
